title: Young voters share which presidential candidate has their votes
shortDescription: Queens, NY, overwhelmingly supported Biden in the 2020 presidential election, but young voters in the county aren't so sure about whom to vote for in 2024.

title: Trump and GOP slam Biden over pledge to keep weapons from Israel
shortDescription: Republicans quickly accuse Biden of trying to placate college demonstrators and left-wing activists who favor the Palestinians

title: Video shows Biden proposing tax increases on wealthy in 2020 | Fact check
shortDescription: The 2020 video shows Biden speaking to a specific individual who'd previously benefitted from tax cuts, not referring to the whole crowd.

title: Bipartisan efforts save Speaker Mike Johnson
shortDescription: Representative Marjorie Taylor Greene faced boos on the House floor in her efforts to oust Mike Johnson as Speaker of the House.

title: Tim Scott, other top Republicans won't commit to accept 2024 results
shortDescription: Top Republicans like Tim Scott are refusing to commit to accept 2024 election results, raising concerns over the potential for another Jan. 6

title: Barron Trump makes political debut as GOP convention delegate
shortDescription: The Republican Party of Florida selected Barron Trump to be an at large convention delegate in Milwaukee in July.

title: The U.S. House elections are where the real battlegrounds play out
shortDescription: Arizona, Michigan and Pennsylvania are three key battleground states in the House of Representatives—and the presidency.

title: Tiny cell in a 'rabbit warren:' what Donald Trump faces if jailed
shortDescription: A judge threatened to jail Donald Trump for gag order violations, but a courthouse cell is more likely, and very different from, Rikers Island.

title: 'It's just wrong. We're not going to supply the weapons' to Israel, says Biden
shortDescription: The Biden administration has paused the shipment of 3,500 bombs to Israel over concerns they could be used in a major military operation in Rafah.

title: See who voted for the motion to vacate Speaker Johnson's chair
shortDescription: The House of Representatives stopped a motion from Rep. Greene to remove Speaker Johnson from the chair in decisive fashion. Here's who voted for it

title: Ohio lawmakers fail to get Joe Biden on November ballot. Now what?
shortDescription: The state House and Senate clashed over competing proposals to get President Joe Biden on Ohio's ballot as time runs out for a solution.

title: In TikTok videos, Army sergeant jailed in Russia panned Biden and NATO
shortDescription: U.S. relations with Moscow were 'definitely better' under Donald Trump, Black told his Russian girlfriend's TikTok audience.

title: House kills effort from Marjorie Taylor Greene to oust Mike Johnson
shortDescription: Democrats and Republicans joined together to dismiss the conservative agitator's motion to vacate against the speaker.

title: These states have new election laws for 2024. Make sure you know yours
shortDescription: A range of new voting laws throughout the U.S. could offer insights as to how ballot access could influence Election Day outcomes.

title: Ohio Senate votes to put Joe Biden on November ballot after DNC snafu
shortDescription: Senate Republicans voted to put President Joe Biden on the ballot, but only after pairing it with campaign finance legislation opposed by Democrats.

title: Biden is president and has power to sign executive orders | Fact check
shortDescription: Ample evidence shows Biden is the president, even if he has not signed an executive order to close the detention center. He has signed other orders.
